testcase.name: test_get_portfolio_demo

failure.message: AssertionError: assert (False) + where False = isinstance({'properties': [{'analysis': {'action_plan': {'high_roi_renovations': [{...}, {...}], 'medium_upgrades': [{...}, {...}, {...}], 'quick_wins': [{...}, {...}, {...}]}, 'design_intelligence': {'color_palette': 'Limewash white, sun-bleached oak, charcoal stone — coherent with the Cycladic vernacular and aligned with current editorial expectations.', 'furnishing_cohesion': 'Fundamentally cohesive — limewash, oak and stone read as one material story; rattan accents fracture the line and should be retired.', 'furniture_quality': 'Mid-tier with selective elevation; swap rattan accents for hand-finished oak to align tactile signal with visual restraint.', 'guest_emotional_perception': 'Arrival reads calm and contemplative; evening softens without programmed light — measurable risk to repeat-stay rates and review sentiment.', ...}, 'layout_intelligence': {'bedroom_privacy': 'Strong — separated wing with stone wall buffer.', 'circulation': 'Good; no choke points.', 'loft_opportunity': 'Vaulted ceiling above living area supports a discrete sleeping mezzanine for +1 sleep.', 'sleeps_per_sqm': '0.06 — slightly under-utilized for premium island STR.', ...}, 'market_intelligence': {'adr_range': ...l with visual restraint.', 'guest_emotional_perception': 'Arrival reads calm and contemplative; evening softens without programmed light — measurable risk to repeat-stay rates and review sentiment.', ...}, 'layout_intelligence': {'bedroom_privacy': 'Strong — separated wing with stone wall buffer.', 'circulation': 'Good; no choke points.', 'loft_opportunity': 'Vaulted ceiling above living area supports a discrete sleeping mezzanine for +1 sleep.', 'sleeps_per_sqm': '0.06 — slightly under-utilized for premium island STR.', ...}, 'market_intelligence': {'adr_range': '€110 – €240', 'competitors': '8 comparable boutique suites within 1.5km; only 3 execute at editorial design standard — defensible scarcity premium.', 'local_market_insights': 'Koufonisia attracts a low-volume, high-spend traveler cohort. Design-led inventory is structurally undersupplied versus Mykonos; peer-set sophistication is rising but absorbable.', 'neighborhood_intelligence': 'Chora sea-facing terrace district commands a 22–28% premium over inland inventory; foot traffic is curated, no near-term saturation risk identified.', ...}, ...}, 'bathrooms': 1, 'bedrooms': 2, 'city': 'Carvalhal, Comporta, Portugal', ...}]}, list)

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter15_regression.py:22: in test_get_portfolio_demo assert isinstance(items, list) and len(items) >= 1 E AssertionError: assert (False) E + where False = isinstance({'properties': [{'analysis': {'action_plan': {'high_roi_renovations': [{...}, {...}], 'medium_upgrades': [{...}, {...}, {...}], 'quick_wins': [{...}, {...}, {...}]}, 'design_intelligence': {'color_palette': 'Limewash white, sun-bleached oak, charcoal stone — coherent with the Cycladic vernacular and aligned with current editorial expectations.', 'furnishing_cohesion': 'Fundamentally cohesive — limewash, oak and stone read as one material story; evening softens without programmed light — measurable risk to repeat-stay rates and review sentiment.', ...}, 'layout_intelligence': {'bedroom_privacy': 'Strong — separated wing with stone wall buffer.', 'circulation': 'Good; no choke points.', 'loft_opportunity': 'Vaulted ceiling above living area supports a discrete sleeping mezzanine for +1 sleep.', 'sleeps_per_sqm': '0.06 — slightly under-utilized for premium island STR.', ...}, 'market_intelligence': {'adr_range': ...l with visual restraint.', 'guest_emotional_perception': 'Arrival reads calm and contemplative; evening softens without programmed light — measurable risk to repeat-stay rates and review sentiment.', ...}, 'layout_intelligence': {'bedroom_privacy': 'Strong — separated wing with stone wall buffer.', 'circulation': 'Good; no choke points.', 'loft_opportunity': 'Vaulted ceiling above living area supports a discrete sleeping mezzanine for +1 sleep.', 'sleeps_per_sqm': '0.06 — slightly under-utilized for premium island STR.', ...}, 'market_intelligence': {'adr_range': '€110 – €240', 'competitors': '8 comparable boutique suites within 1.5km; only 3 execute at editorial design standard — defensible scarcity premium.', 'local_market_insights': 'Koufonisia attracts a low-volume, high-spend traveler cohort. Design-led inventory is structurally undersupplied versus Mykonos; peer-set sophistication is rising but absorbable.', 'neighborhood_intelligence': 'Chora sea-facing terrace district commands a 22–28% premium over inland inventory; foot traffic is curated, no near-term saturation risk identified.', ...}, ...}, 'bathrooms': 1, 'bedrooms': 2, 'city': 'Carvalhal, Comporta, Portugal', ...}]}, list)
